steps.title: Use the two roots
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(8,0)$ and $(-3,0)$, so the roots are $8$ and $-3$. Therefore,
$$f(x)=a(x-8)(x+3)$$

steps.title: Find b in terms of a
Test the possible values
steps.content:
Then
$$a+b=a-5a=-4a$$
Since $a$ is an integer greater than $1$, the first possible value is when $a=2$.
$$-4(2)=-8$$
The answer is A.
